name: digipay-appium-typescript
description: Enterprise iOS Appium Automation Framework with WebdriverIO and TypeScript

scripts.build:sim: xcodebuild build -project ../../Digipay.xcodeproj -scheme Digipay -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'id=42583C5A-BB47-45FB-A0DE-B007BFC9FA60' -derivedDataPath ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData ONLY_ACTIVE_ARCH=NO CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY='' CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO | tail -3
scripts.test:smoke:real: DEVICE=real npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --suite smoke
scripts.test:functional:real: DEVICE=real npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --suite functional
scripts.test:regression:real: DEVICE=real npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts --suite regression
scripts.test:ci: npx wdio run config/wdio.conf.ts; python3 scripts/generate_excel_report.py
